content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — App schedules automatic hourly repeating push notifications (NotificationScheduler.swift: `scheduleHourlyDeals`, `repeats: true`, 3600s interval) and metadata explicitly advertises "EVERY HOUR... unlimited notifications" (description.txt), matching Apple's spam-push pattern.

Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits push notifications used for promotional/marketing spam not directly requested per-instance by the user, and hourly automated blasts are a textbook rejection trigger under 4.5.4/4.5.1. The code schedules a repeating hourly local notification with promotional copy ("🔥 Hot deal alert!"), and the store listing brags about unlimited hourly alerts, which reviewers will likely flag or reject. Recommend switching to opt-in, user-configurable alert frequency (e.g., daily digest or user-set thresholds) and removing "EVERY HOUR / unlimited" language from the description.
